_note: Authoritative colour and type tokens. design/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md explains every value. .streamlit/config.toml mirrors the palette by hand (TOML cannot read JSON); tests/test_design_system.py fails if they drift.
fontSans: Source Sans Pro, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
fontMono: Source Code Pro, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace
